title: Huawei eKitOptiX FG630, Edge ONT & Dual-Band Wi-Fi 6 router
description: The Huawei eKitOptiX FG630 is a wireless dual-band Wi-Fi 6 router that is perfectly suited for combination with ONT units in bridge mode . It works simultaneously in the 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands, delivering a maximum total throughput of up to 2.98Gbps and is equipped with (3) 1Gbit LAN/WAN ports. The router is Mesh-compatible and can be wirelessly paired with other Huawei products to create a complete home network with a single SSID, allowing seamless roaming (3) 1Gbit LAN/WAN ports and dual-band Wi-Fi 6 Total throughput up to 2.98Gbps - 574Mbps on 2.4GHz (2x2) and 2402Mbps on 5GHz (2x2) MU-MIMO - simultaneous connectivity for multiple devices Beamforming - wider coverage and higher connection stability thanks to directional signal shaping Enhanced WPA3 security - the latest and most advanced Wi-Fi protection standard
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2402 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Roaming Yes Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (3) 10/100/1000Mbps LAN/WAN Gigabit LAN Yes Power Max. power consumption [W] 12 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset, WPS Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 330 Width [mm] 188 Height [mm] 140 Depth [mm] 35
